'''dhadhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qingsongite|qingsongite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qingsongite|qingsongite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhihith|dhædhihith]] || [[word:dhædhihij|dhædhihij]] || [[word:dhædhihish|dhædhihish]] || [[word:dhædhihi|dhædhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhudhuhuth|dhadhudhuhuth]] || [[word:dhadhudhuhuj|dhadhudhuhuj]] || [[word:dhadhudhuhush|dhadhudhuhush]] || [[word:dhadhudhuhu|dhadhudhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhuhuth|dhadhuhuth]] || [[word:dhadhuhuj|dhadhuhuj]] || [[word:dhadhuhush|dhadhuhush]] || [[word:dhadhuhu|dhadhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhufhufth|dhadhufhufth]] || [[word:dhadhufhufj|dhadhufhufj]] || [[word:dhadhufhufsh|dhadhufhufsh]] || [[word:dhadhufhuf|dhadhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhuhuthu|dhadhuhuthu]] || [[word:dhadhuhuju|dhadhuhuju]] || [[word:dhadhuhushu|dhadhuhushu]] || [[word:dhadhuhuku|dhadhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhuhuth|dhadhuhuth]] || [[word:dhadhuhuj|dhadhuhuj]] || [[word:dhadhuhush|dhadhuhush]] || [[word:dhadhuhu|dhadhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhuhuthul|dhadhuhuthul]] || [[word:dhadhuhujul|dhadhuhujul]] || [[word:dhadhuhushul|dhadhuhushul]] || [[word:dhadhuhukul|dhadhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhuhuuthuthu|dhadhuhuuthuthu]] || [[word:dhadhuhuujuju|dhadhuhuujuju]] || [[word:dhadhuhuushushu|dhadhuhuushushu]] || [[word:dhadhuhuuku|dhadhuhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhuhuthun|dhadhuhuthun]] || [[word:dhadhuhujun|dhadhuhujun]] || [[word:dhadhuhushun|dhadhuhushun]] || [[word:dhadhuhukun|dhadhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhuhuthuoro|dhadhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhadhuhujuoro|dhadhuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhadhuhushuoro|dhadhuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhadhuhukuoro|dhadhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
